heading: NATIVE HAWAIIAN HEALTH CARE
label: 122 NATIVE HAWAIIAN HEALTH CARE
notes: CodificationAs originally enacted, this chapter was comprised of (§§ 1–12) and subtitle D (§§ 2301–2312) of title II of , which enacted substantially identical sections and which were both known as the Native Hawaiian Health Care Act of 1988. , , , subsequently amended the Act generally. As so amended, the Act was renamed the Native Hawaiian Health Care Improvement Act and consists of sections 1 to 16 which enacted this chapter, repealed , Indians, and enacted provisions set out as a Short Title note under .
